subtasks.description: Query spend data for Adobe and Microsoft across all quarters of 2024. Calculate quarter-over-quarter spend change for each publisher (Q1-Q2, Q2-Q3, Q3-Q4) and identify all products within each publisher with their Q4 spend amounts. Return results grouped by publisher and sorted by QoQ change and Q4 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: Single sql_gen subtask (mid tier) combines both analytical requirements: QoQ spend change calculations across all three transitions in 2024 and product ranking by Q4 spend. This requires multi-quarter aggregation with window functions (LAG for prior quarter comparisons) and filtering by publisher and year, but does not require cross-source reconciliation or complex inference—mid tier is appropriate. No separate subtask needed for ranking since it's part of the same query output ordering. No cross_recon needed as this is single-source SQL analysis. No additional subtasks required for this straightforward analytical query.

output.sql: WITH quarterly AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe','Microsoft') AND event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter), pub_quarterly AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, SUM(spend) AS pub_spend FROM quarterly GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter), pub_pivot AS (SELECT publisher, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=1 THEN pub_spend END) AS q1_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=2 THEN pub_spend END) AS q2_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=3 THEN pub_spend END) AS q3_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=4 THEN pub_spend END) AS q4_spend FROM pub_quarterly GROUP BY publisher), product_q4 AS (SELECT publisher, product, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=4 THEN spend ELSE 0 END) AS product_q4_spend FROM quarterly GROUP BY publisher, product) SELECT p.publisher, pq.product, pq.product_q4_spend, p.q1_spend, p.q2_spend, p.q3_spend, p.q4_spend, (p.q2_spend - p.q1_spend) AS qoq_q1_q2, (p.q3_spend - p.q2_spend) AS qoq_q2_q3, (p.q4_spend - p.q3_spend) AS qoq_q3_q4 FROM pub_pivot p JOIN product_q4 pq ON p.publisher = pq.publisher ORDER BY p.publisher, (p.q4_spend - p.q3_spend) DESC, pq.product_q4_spend DESC
